latestHandledAlerts.name: Pixi wants to replace your boring text messages with AR characters that react to you - Digital Trends
latestHandledAlerts.reason: 自动规则未命中强升级条件；按 补 source linkage / candidate deep-dive / funding-news review 留在 monitor 观察，不升级主表或融资时间线。后续若出现融资、下载/收入、官方发布、明确 IRL 履约或产品级投放证据，再进入升级复核。
